name: caishen-monorepo
description: 财神爷 v2 — Code-defined replacement for the n8n forex trading system. Subscription-only billing (zero Anthropic API charges; constitution §1). Multi-tenant from day one.

scripts.prepare: node -e "try { require('node:child_process').execSync('git rev-parse --git-dir', { stdio: 'ignore' }); require('node:child_process').execSync('lefthook install', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (_) { console.log('[prepare] skipping lefthook install — not in a git repo (typical for Vercel build env)'); }"
